title: Session Plan
description: The structured output of the Plan Agent. This is what gets delivered to the user as their workout. Every field that represents a decision must include reasoning.

readiness_score.description: Output of the Readiness Agent after running snapshot against readiness.yaml.

readiness_reasoning.description: Which specific rules fired to produce this readiness score. Each item is one rule trigger.

effective_intensity_ceiling.description: Final ceiling = min(readiness_ceiling, cycle_phase_ceiling). This is what constrains the plan.

exercises.description: Ordered list of exercises. Follow this sequence.

reps.description: Rep target or range, e.g. '8–12' or '10'. Use string to allow ranges.

load.description: Weight or pace. e.g., '25 lbs each', '5.5 mph', 'bodyweight'. Null for mobility/recovery work.

rpe_target.description: Target RPE for this exercise. Used by user to self-regulate.

notes.description: Form cues, substitution options, or context.

focus_cue.description: One sentence intention for the session. Not motivational fluff — a specific technical or effort cue.

estimated_duration_minutes.description: Realistic time estimate including warm-up and rest periods.

progression_note.description: What changed from the last session and why. If nothing changed, say so. This is the system showing its work.

overrides_applied.description: Any user-requested deviations from the rules-based prescription. Logged here so the feedback loop accounts for them.
